summary: Solid test suite covering all core requirements: semantic versioning, commit parsing, changelog generation, file I/O, and workflow execution. Tests are well-organized into logical modules (bumper, parser, changelog, main) with clear fixtures and helper functions. The act-harness thoroughly validates the workflow end-to-end with exact output assertions. Strengths: good organization, type-safe, multiple test levels (unit/integration/E2E), error handling. Weaknesses: limited edge case coverage (missing JSON parse failures, malformed inputs, special characters), act-harness only tests 3 specific cases rather than variations, some duplication between main.test.ts and act-harness integration tests. Would catch most regressions in primary functionality but lacks depth for boundary conditions.
